info.title: There was an error. Please try the command verbs [Validate,Deploy]

validate    (Default Verb)
deploy      Deploys the source DTDL to a target ADT
help        Display more information on a specific command.
version     Display version information.

options.name: --failure-only
options.description:
When set, filters results to only show failures
in validation

options.name: --strict
options.description:
When set, forces all warning during processing
to be thrown as Exceptions

options.name: --source-input-path
options.description:
(Group: sourceInputOptions) Supply a directory
path for input. This must contain the models for
deployment as JSON files.

options.name: --source-tenant
options.description: The home tenant of the ADT to authenticate with

options.name: --source-twin-instance
options.description:
(Group: sourceInputOptions) The Url of the ADT
Instance used for a target

options.name: --source-input-pattern
options.description: Supply a pattern for finding files within

options.name: --target-input-path
options.description:
(Group: targetInputOptions) Supply a directory
path for comparision as a Target. This must
contain the models for comparions as JSON files.

options.name: --target-tenant
options.description: The home tenant of the ADT to authenticate with

options.name: --target-twin-instance
options.description:
(Group: targetInputOptions) The Url of the ADT
Instance used for a target

options.name: --target-input-pattern
options.description: Supply a pattern for finding files within

options.name: --help
options.description: Display this help screen.

options.name: --version
options.description: Display version information.
